Upcoming Events

Join us for worship, fellowship, and community activities.

Easter Sunday Service

Date: April 9, 2024

Time: 10:00 AM

Location: Main Sanctuary

Join us for a special Easter celebration with worship, music, and fellowship.

Community Outreach Day

Date: March 23, 2024

Time: 9:00 AM - 3:00 PM

Location: Community Center

Serve our local community through food drives, cleaning, and support services.

Bible Study Workshop

Date: March 18, 2024

Time: 7:00 PM

Location: Fellowship Hall

Deep dive into scripture with interactive discussions and learning.

Youth Retreat

Date: April 12-14, 2024

Time: Friday-Sunday

Location: Camp Crystal Lake

A weekend of fun, faith, and fellowship for our youth group.

Women's Ministry Brunch

Date: March 30, 2024

Time: 11:00 AM

Location: Church Cafe

Monthly gathering for fellowship, prayer, and encouragement.

Men's Breakfast

Date: April 6, 2024

Time: 8:00 AM

Location: Fellowship Hall

Monthly breakfast meeting for fellowship and discussion.
